title: POST /status/report request body
description: Status report payload sent by the autopilot status reporter (agent-coordinator/scripts/report_status.py). This schema documents the fields the endpoint accepts; it intentionally matches the existing Pydantic StatusReportRequest model (see agent-coordinator/src/coordination_api.py::StatusReportRequest). The phase_archetype field was added by archived change add-per-phase-archetype-resolution (already in StatusReportRequest at line 221); this proposal wires the producer (report_status.py) to actually populate it from loop-state.json.

change_id.description: OpenSpec change-id this status report relates to (defaults to empty string when no change is active)

phase.description: Current autopilot phase id. Free-form string (autopilot phases listed below are conventional but the API accepts any value with maxLength <= 64).

phase_archetype.description: Resolved archetype for the current phase. Null when no archetype was resolved (coordinator unreachable, harness Agent unavailable, or override path with no archetype semantics).

needs_human.description: Set when the agent requires human intervention to continue

event_type.description: Free-form event-type string. Conventional values used by the existing status reporter: 'status.phase_transition' (default heartbeat-style report), 'status.escalated' (set when needs_human=true), and historical 'status.gate_check' / 'status.phase_skip' from archived changes. The API does not enforce an enum.

examples.message: running with harness defaults — coordinator was unreachable
